questions.question: Which of the following is a supervised learning algorithm?
What does CNN stand for in deep learning?
Which activation function is commonly used in the output layer for binary classification?
What is overfitting in machine learning?
options: Model performs well on both train and test data
Model performs well on training data but poorly on test data
Model performs poorly on training data
questions.answer: Model performs well on training data but poorly on test data
